calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Vamsi Sailendra Atreyas Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up Hearing Regarding Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-03-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Tom H. Elke, Esq., appearing for and with Plaintiff, Vamsi Sailendra Atreya, sworn and examined,
No appearance by defaulted defendant David Lefkowitz,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Economic Damages: $70,260.18 (Trebled Damages)
Special Damages: $140,520.36 (Trebled Damages)
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $34,300.00
Costs: $885.80
Total Judgment in the amount of $245,966.34

Counsel to submit Proposed Judgment for Court signature by 11/4/2016 noon.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-10-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Set For Case Management Conference On Oct-19-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant David Lefkowitz
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Tom Elke, (415)294-4111 for Plaintiff/Moving Pary VAmsi Sailendra.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF VAMSI ATREYA MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant David Lefkowitz is GRANTED. Defendant Lefkowitz's answer is stricken. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant David Lefkowitz To Provide Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatoriesgeneral, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, Requests For Admissions, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Tom H Elke for Plaintiff Vamsi Sailendra Atreya the moving party.
No appearance by the opposing party.

PLAINTIFF VAMSI ATREYA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant David Lefkowitz To Provide Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories general, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, Requests For Admissions, And Request For Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant shall provide responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request for Production and Request for Admissions within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,915.
Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
